title: Ruriko the Beer Vendor Girl / Welcome, Regular / Candy and Tears
overview: Wage slave Murata comes to the ballpark to relax, until a new beer vendor girl catches his eye...

title: The Definition of a Baseball Fan / No! Never! / The Head Scarf of Innocence
overview: A mysterious woman visits the ballpark, Ruriko tries to max her following, and a meal vendor laments her fate.

title: The Goddess of Baseball? / The Invincible Mascot / Rah! Rah! Rah!
overview: A foreign player seeks motivation, a mascot helps the other staff, and Ruriko and Murata encourage each other.

title: Soul Announcer / The Suggestion Box Incident (Pt. 1) / The Suggestion Box Incident (Pt. 2)
overview: Nagisa the announcer struggles with her usual bit, and Detective Ruriko tries to crack a case.

title: Ticks Me Off! / The Meal Pack Capriccio / Different Faces
overview: Ruriko's jealousy is sparked, Yuki meets a rival in the concourse, and a rain delay threatens a MotorSuns win.

title: A Good Kid / So Many Treasures / Going Off-Script
overview: Sara deals with unexpected customers, the vendors clean out the back room, and an all-star game goes wild.

title: The Pointless 99 Times / Bonds Forged Over Food / Transform!!
overview: Ruriko gets inspired, Ichinomiya struggles with inferiority, and a new spread appears in Weekly Baseball.

title: It's the Wind's Fault / Signs / Watch Out for Online News!
overview: There's a windy day at the park, Ruriko attends a game on her off day, and a tabloid reporter shadows Aona.

title: Tommy's Melancholy / Mr. Murata / Show Your Sun
overview: Ruriko meets a baseball dog, Murata's wallet goes missing, and the team pumps themselves up for the playoffs.

title: Us Back Then / Whack That Bottom! / The Double-T Duo
overview: Kohinata meets a former co-worker who is now dedicated to acting.

title: The Clincher! / The Clincher! (Pt. 2) / The Clincher! (Pt. 3)
overview: Ballpark regulars and new fans come together to cheer on the MotorSuns in their playoff clincher game!

title: Transformative Game / Last Message / It's Opening Day, Okay?!
overview: The MotorSuns and their fans bid farewell to the season with high hopes for the next year.
